message:
feat: branch point switcher for alternate conversation paths

Add BranchSwitcher component that shows "Path N of M" with prev/next
navigation at fork points. Rewrite InfiniteMessageList to derive
effectiveMessages from branchPoints + pathSelections, inserting switcher
controls at forks and applying dashed-border visual treatment to
alternate-path messages. Lift pathSelections state to SessionDetail so
the minimap can consume it later.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
